regions.text: Here are Mrs. Smith, her daughter Jane, and her son Tom.
They are at the table. They are having their potato soup.
Potato soup is a thick soup. It is not clear. Thick soup and clear soup are two different sorts of soup.
This water is clear. When a liquid is clear we see through it.
Milk is not a clear liquid. We do not see through it.
The air is clear. I see the mountains. When the air is not clear I do not see them.
